title: ononis spinosa proles antiquorum
intro: Ononis spinosa proles antiquorum, also known as the old-man's-son or old-man's onion, is a type of plant that belongs to the Ononis genus of flowering plants in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa proles antiquorum include its potential to treat conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote urinary health and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
